allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Projects\\code3\\backend"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "--experimental-sqlite server.js" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\backend_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\backend_err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\backend_out.txt"; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\backend_err.txt")

PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/calling/0101"; Write-Output "0101 title: $\($r1.title.Substring\(0,30\)\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/calling/list?limit=3"; Write-Output "total: $\($r2.total\), returned: $\($r2.data.Count\)")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID $proc" } else { Write-Output "No process on port 3000" })
